title: RPS-League
description: A full-stack app that displays a Rock-Paper-Scissors League. The backend handles data processing, winner calculation and leaderboard ranking. The frontend provides five distinct views with defensive handling for error states, empty states, input validation and consistent design system using CSS modules.

title: DOPC
description: A Delivery Order Price Calculator that is based on cart value, user location and venue delivery pricing rules.  Built with proper labels, ARIA attributes, edge-case handling, instant validation, loading and error states, localStorage persistence and browser geolocation to ensure a smooth and reliable UX.

title: The Transcenders
description: I refined my frontend skills by building responsive and interactive interfaces from scratch. I learned how to handle dynamic updates and create a smooth, user-friendly experience. This project also sharpened my problem-solving skills by pushing me to optimize performance.

title: Smartwatch Landing Page
description: Designed in Figma, focusing on visual hierarchy, usability and responsive design. This project shows mastery of UI and UX principles through the thoughtful structure of layout, consistent typography and engaging color palette. The emphasis is on clarity, conversion and an appealing product.

title: Soil Health Dashboard
description: A dashboard that visualizes soil health metrics. The interactive chart was built with Chart.js, dynamic metric toggling and summary cards of current, minimum and maximum values. The emphasis is in state-driven UI updates, reusable components and E2E testing with Cypress to ensure reliable user interactions.

title: 2D Fractals
description: In this project I created mesmerizing fractals, including the Julia set, the Mandelbrot set and the Burning Ship set. Additionally, it allowed me to combine mathematics with computer graphics and develop a deeper appreciation for visual programming.
